name: cc-greenfield-kit
description: Greenfield development kit: a PRD/TDD/ADR design-doc pipeline with phase-gate PRs, toolchain bootstrap, and gated unattended implementation (mechanical verify + independent review before any TDD is marked done; one PR per TDD).

plugins.description: Greenfield bootstrap kit: project-setup skill, standard subagents, and a format+lint hook.
